The '''Kashyyyk slash-spider''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of arachnid native to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. The scissors-like mandibles of the spider provided the name for the [[Slip-jaws/Legends|slip-jaws]], a maneuver that was utilized in [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]]. The spiders typically loitered around ponds and shores in order to hunt smaller fish and crustaceans.

==Appearances==
